)]}' 1346 [["wrb.fr", "ujx1Bf", "[[null, [[[\"c_aaaa1111bbbb2222\", \"r_1111aaaa2222bbbb\"], null, [[\"What are three tips for keeping houseplants healthy indoors?\"], 1, null, 0, \"rc_r_1111aaaa2222bbbb\"], [[[\"r_1111aaaa2222bbbb\", [\"**Three tips for healthy indoor houseplants:**\\n\\n1. **Light:** Match each plant to the right light level; most foliage plants like bright, indirect light.\\n2. **Water:** Let the top inch of soil dry out before watering again to avoid root rot.\\n3. **Humidity:** Group plants together or use a pebble tray to raise humidity for tropical species.\"], [], null, null, null]], [[\"Follow-up question one?\"], [\"Follow-up question two?\"]], null, \"rc_r_1111aaaa2222bbbb\", null, null], [1700000000, 0]], [[\"c_cccc3333dddd4444\", \"r_3333cccc4444dddd\"], null, [[\"How often should I repot them?\"], 1, null, 0, \"rc_r_3333cccc4444dddd\"], [[[\"r_3333cccc4444dddd\", [\"Most houseplants only need repotting **every 12 to 18 months**, or when roots grow out of the drainage holes. Move up just one pot size and refresh the soil in spring for best results.\"], [], null, null, null]], [[\"Follow-up question one?\"], [\"Follow-up question two?\"]], null, \"rc_r_3333cccc4444dddd\", null, null], [1700000100, 0]]], [null, \"Houseplant care tips\"], null, null, null, null], null, false]", null, null, null, "generic"]] 59 [["di", 42], ["af.httprm", 42, "1234567890123456789", 91]]
